name_cn:
🎉New Shoulder Bag🎉🎉🎉
Unique Saffiano leather redefines the Re-Edition 2005 silhouette. This versatile bag is suitable for day and night due to its compact and elegant design, featuring a practical zip closure and adorned with the iconic enamel metal triangle logo. Spacious yet a timeless classic🎉🎉
Model: 1N204W
Size: 22x18x6cm
